caption: A man with a tall, grey, stylized wig and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders, wearing black over-ear headphones. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items displayed on mannequins. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "THE STUDIO PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY" with a smaller line below stating "FOLLOW US @GOSSTALKJOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his right hand and shifting his facial expression while talking, while the camera remains static and the background elements stay unchanged.
